text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Tragic end of a special operation 📝 On the deaths of U.S. embassy employees in Mexico A car crash in the Mexican state of Chihuahua claimed the lives of four people. A vehicle carrying two U.S. embassy employees and two Mexican officers went off the road in a mountainous area. The group was returning after a successful joint operation in Chihuahua. Law enforcement managed to discover and eliminate six major underground methamphetamine production laboratories , including one of the largest complexes in the country. Among the dead was the head of the local Investigation Agency Pedro Roman Osegera Cervantes . 📌 U.S. Ambassador to Mexico Ronald Johnson reported this. He is a former special forces officer and CIA operative whom Donald Trump deliberately appointed to this position for a tough crackdown on drug cartels. Under his tenure, Americans secured permission from the Mexican government for joint military operations against drug labs. 🖍 Given the circumstances of their deaths, a fair question arises: was this really an accident? Social media users actively claim that the Americans were killed by members of a drug cartel , and the deceased were employees of a drug enforcement agency. ❗️ Such an assumption, especially considering historical precedent and the recent operation to kill the head of "New Generation Jalisco" El Mencho, seems quite plausible. And to avoid acknowledging the murder and causing panic, the Americans could have covered it up. #Mexico #USA 🇺🇸 @rybar_america — making America understandable again 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ 📝 特别行动的悲惨结局 📝 关于美国驻墨西哥大使馆员工死亡事件 墨西哥奇瓦瓦州发生一起车祸，造成四人死亡。一辆载有两名美国大使馆员工和两名墨西哥警官的车辆在山区冲出道路。该小组在奇瓦瓦州成功完成联合行动后正在返回途中。执法部门成功发现并捣毁了六个大型地下甲基苯丙胺生产实验室，其中包括该国最大的综合设施之一。死者中包括当地调查局局长佩德罗·罗曼·奥塞格拉·塞万提斯（Pedro Roman Osegera Cervantes）。 📌 美国驻墨西哥大使罗纳德·约翰逊（Ronald Johnson）报告了此事。他曾是一名特种部队军官和中央情报局特工，唐纳德·特朗普特意任命他担任此职，以严厉打击贩毒集团。在他任职期间，美国人获得了墨西哥政府的许可，可以针对毒品实验室进行联合军事行动。 🖍 鉴于他们死亡的情况，一个合理的问题出现了：这真的是一场意外吗？社交媒体用户积极声称美国人是被贩毒集团成员杀害的，而死者是缉毒机构的员工。 ❗️ 这种假设，特别是考虑到历史先例以及最近针对“哈利斯科新一代”贩毒集团头目“埃尔·门乔”（El Mencho）的暗杀行动，似乎相当可信。为了避免承认谋杀并引起恐慌，美国人可能掩盖了真相。 #墨西哥 #美国 🇺🇸 @rybar_america — 让美国再次变得可以理解 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: 🇱🇧 An Israeli occupation soldier posted photos of herself picking vegetables and cooking inside a home in southern Lebanon — while its owners remain banned from returning. The house still had food in the kitchen. The garden was still alive. Everything was exactly as the family left it — except the family. In their place, a soldier in full uniform, laughing, making herself at home. Fifty-five villages in southern Lebanon remain closed to their residents. The people who planted those gardens, built those kitchens, and filled those homes are not allowed back. Someone else is eating their food. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 一名以色列占领军士兵发布了自己在黎巴嫩南部一户人家中采摘蔬菜和做饭的照片——而这户房子的主人仍被禁止返回。厨房里还有食物。花园依然生机勃勃。一切都和这家人离开时一模一样——除了这家人。取而代之的是一名全副武装、欢声笑语、把这里当成自己家的士兵。黎巴嫩南部的五十五个村庄仍对居民关闭。那些种植这些花园、建造这些厨房、填满这些家园的人不被允许回来。其他人正在吃他们的食物。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Army Radio: Israeli officials say that if no agreement is reached on Iran’s missile programme, another round of strikes targeting Iran’s missile industry is viewed as likely within the coming years. They add that an Iran possessing thousands of missiles is considered a “red line,” warning that if it is crossed, “an attack would be required.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台：以色列官员表示，如果无法就伊朗的导弹计划达成协议，未来几年内很可能会对伊朗的导弹工业进行新一轮打击。他们补充说，拥有数千枚导弹的伊朗被视为一条“红线”，并警告说如果越过这条红线，“就需要进行攻击”。 @wfwitness

text: Israeli army warns residents of southern Lebanon not to head south of 21 villages and not to return to 58 others The 58 are outside of the fake red zone

text: ↩️ Reply to الإعلام الحربي في المقاومة الإسلامية: "بِسْمِ اللَّـهِ الرحمن الرَّحِيمِ‏﴿أُذِنَ لِلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتَلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ظُلِمُوا۟ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصْرِهِمْ لَقَدِيرٌ﴾‏صَدَقَ اللهُ العَلِيّ العَظِيم" Wonderful Going back to the 15 month era is unacceptable and traitorous This proves we are on the right track hamdella.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 伊斯兰抵抗运动军事媒体：“奉至仁至慈的真主之名，‘被进攻者已获准抵抗，因为他们受了压迫。真主对于援助他们，确是全能的。’至高无上的真主所言极是。” 太棒了，回到15个月前的时代是不可接受且背叛的行为。这证明我们走在正确的道路上，感谢真主。

text: 🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates has warned U.S. officials that without access to dollar liquidity, it may shift oil transactions to Chinese yuan — a direct threat to dollar dominance in global energy markets. U.A.E. Central Bank Governor Khaled Mohamed Balama raised the prospect of a currency swap line with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve officials on the sidelines of last week's IMF and World Bank meetings in Washington. Emirati officials framed the request as precautionary but argued that Trump's decision to strike Iran dragged their country into a conflict it did not choose. Iran fired over 2,800 drones and missiles at the U.A.E. before a ceasefire took effect April 17, damaging oil infrastructure and blocking tanker access through the Strait of Hormuz. The dirham is pegged to the dollar and backed by $270 billion in reserves, but analysts warn of capital flight and volatility risks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇪 阿拉伯联合酋长国已向美国官员发出警告，如果无法获得美元流动性，可能会将石油交易转向人民币——这对美元在全球能源市场的主导地位构成了直接威胁。阿联酋央行行长哈立德·穆罕默德·巴拉马在上周华盛顿国际货币基金组织和世界银行会议期间，向财政部长斯科特·贝森特和美联储官员提出了建立货币互换额度的可能性。阿联酋官员将此请求描述为预防性措施，但辩称特朗普打击伊朗的决定将他们的国家拖入了一场非其所愿的冲突。在4月17日停火生效前，伊朗向阿联酋发射了超过2800架无人机和导弹，破坏了石油基础设施并封锁了油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道。迪拉姆与美元挂钩，并有2700亿美元的储备作为支撑，但分析人士警告称存在资本外逃和波动风险。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇧🇬 🇪🇺 Former President Rumen Radev, projected to win Bulgaria's election by a wide margin according to exit polls, said Europe has fallen victim to its own ambition to be a moral leader. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel The Israeli military says it struck a primed Hezbollah rocket launcher north of the “forward defense line” in southern Lebanon overnight, saying the loaded launcher in the Qalaouiyah area “posed an immediate threat to IDF troops and Israeli citizens.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046105267213865083/video/1 tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) An enormous cloud of smoke rising over the Russian city of Tuapse due to a fire at the local oil refinery caused by Ukrainian strikes. The pile of black smoke rising hundreds of meters into the air. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046094070200582253/video/1 Absolutely massive fire at the Tuapse oil refinery located in southern Russia following Ukrainian strikes last night. Several fuel tanks seen burning. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046091825757192289/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）由于乌克兰的袭击导致当地炼油厂发生火灾，俄罗斯图阿普谢市上空升起巨大的烟云。黑烟柱升至数百米高空。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046094070200582253/video/1 昨晚乌克兰袭击后，位于俄罗斯南部的图阿普谢炼油厂发生极其猛烈的火灾。可以看到几个燃料罐正在燃烧。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046091825757192289/video/1 - Status-6（战争与军事新闻）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE…" 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 The moment the US Navy's Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) opened fire on the Iranian-flagged cargo ship M/V Touska in the Sea of Oman. The Touska served as a regular China-Iran shipping link and is part of the broader bilateral trade between the two countries that has continued despite Western sanctions. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）……” 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号（DDG 111）在阿曼海向伊朗籍货船M/V Touska开火的瞬间。Touska号是中伊之间定期的航运纽带，也是两国间持续进行的双边贸易的一部分，尽管西方实施了制裁。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸⚔️🇮🇷 Video of the USS Spruance firing its 127mm Mk 45 naval gun at the engine room of Iranian merchant vessel M/V Touska after the ship attempted to breach a US-imposed naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM shows US Marines boarding Iranian-flagged Touska 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸⚔️🇮🇷 视频显示，在伊朗商船M/V Touska试图突破美国在阿曼湾实施的海军封锁后，斯普鲁恩斯号（USS Spruance）使用其127毫米Mk 45舰炮向该船机舱开火。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 中央司令部展示美国海军陆战队登上一艘伊朗籍Touska号货船 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Ossoff says American politics is “coin operated,” with money driving decisions and favors, saying a system fueled by corporate and billionaire cash helped produce a president who exploits it for power and profit. https://x.com/atrupar/status/2046086742126604301/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 奥索夫称美国政治是“投币式”的，金钱驱动着决策和利益输送，并表示一个由企业和亿万富翁现金驱动的系统，助长了一位利用该系统谋取权力和利润的总统。 https://x.com/atrupar/status/2046086742126604301/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender A U.S. Navy F/A-18E Super Hornet assigned to the “Tophatters” of Strike Fighter Squadron 14 (VFA-14), Carrier Air Wing Nine (CVW-9), takes off from the flight deck of the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) deployed to the Arabian Sea, in support of the ongoing U.S. naval blockade against the Islamic Republic of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一架隶属于第14战斗攻击机中队（VFA-14）“高帽者”、第9舰载机联队（CVW-9）的美国海军F/A-18E“超级大黄蜂”战斗机，从部署在阿拉伯海的亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN-72）飞行甲板上起飞，以支持美国目前对伊朗伊斯兰共和国实施的海军封锁。 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines depart amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7) by helicopter and transit over the Arabian Sea to board and seize M/V Touska. The Marines rappelled onto the Iranian-flagged vessel, April 19, after guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) disabled Touska’s propulsion when the commercial ship failed to comply with repeated warnings from U.S. forces over a six-hour period. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国海军陆战队乘坐直升机离开两栖攻击舰的黎波里号（LHA 7），飞越阿拉伯海，登上并扣押了M/V Touska号。4月19日，在导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号（DDG 111）使Touska号失去动力后，海军陆战队通过绳降登上了这艘伊朗籍船只。此前，该商船在六小时内未遵守美国军队的多次警告。 推文

text: WarMonitor “Hundreds” of AI-generated fake pro-Trump social media accounts have been identified ahead of the midterms, using coordinated posts to mimic real users and shape narratives. (NYT) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046085510884450429/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在中期选举前，“数百个”人工智能生成的虚假亲特朗普社交媒体账户被识别出来，它们利用协调一致的帖子模仿真实用户并塑造舆论。（纽约时报） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046085510884450429/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Iran Dismantles Mossad-Linked Terror Cell, Executes Two Operatives Mohammed Masoum Shahi and Hamid Walidi, members of an espionage network linked to Mossad, were executed after completing the full legal process and Supreme Court confirmation. Authorities say the pair coordinated with handlers online and traveled to the Kurdistan Region of Iraq for training in terrorist operations before returning to Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 伊朗捣毁与摩萨德有关的恐怖小组，处决两名特工。穆罕默德·马苏姆·沙希（Mohammed Masoum Shahi）和哈米德·瓦利迪（Hamid Walidi）是与摩萨德有关的间谍网络成员，在完成全部法律程序并经最高法院确认后被处决。当局称，两人在网上与联络人协调，并前往伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区接受恐怖行动训练，随后返回伊朗。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇦🇪 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 ⚡️ UAE Warns of Shift to Chinese Yuan for Oil Sales if Dollar Access Tightens Amid Hormuz Disruptions Emirati officials stated that if dollar access becomes constrained — partly due to disruptions in oil sales through the Strait of Hormuz — the UAE could shift to alternative currencies like the Chinese yuan for oil exports. UAE Central Bank Governor Khaled Mohamed Balama discussed a potential currency-swap line with U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and officials from the Federal Reserve to secure dollar liquidity. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇦🇪 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 阿联酋警告称，若霍尔木兹海峡中断导致美元获取受限，石油销售或转向人民币。阿联酋官员表示，如果美元获取变得紧张（部分原因是霍尔木兹海峡石油销售中断），阿联酋可能会在石油出口中转向人民币等替代货币。阿联酋央行行长哈立德·穆罕默德·巴拉马（Khaled Mohamed Balama）与美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）及美联储官员讨论了潜在的货币互换额度，以确保美元流动性。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Michael A. Horowitz Wonder if they got "inspired" by Iran's own use of cluster munitions to challenge air defenses North Korea used cluster bombs in latest missile test, state news agency says. The latest tests follow others in recent weeks, including ballistic missiles, anti-warship cruise missiles and cluster munitions https://u.afp.com/SEaD https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2046083056721690750/photo/1 - AFP News Agency tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 想知道他们是否从伊朗自己使用集束弹药挑战防空系统的行为中得到了“启发”。据国家通讯社报道，朝鲜在最近的导弹试验中使用了集束炸弹。最近的试验紧随近几周的其他试验之后，包括弹道导弹、反舰巡航导弹和集束弹药 https://u.afp.com/SEaD https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2046083056721690750/photo/1 - 法新社推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. Marines depart amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7) by helicopter and transit over the Arabian Sea to board and seize M/V Touska. The Marines rappelled onto the Iranian-flagged vessel, April 20, after guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) disabled Touska’s propulsion when the commercial ship failed to comply with repeated warnings from U.S. forces over a six-hour period." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国中央司令部 (CENTCOM)：“美国海军陆战队乘坐直升机离开两栖攻击舰的黎波里号 (LHA 7)，飞越阿拉伯海，登船并扣押了 M/V Touska 号。4月20日，在导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号 (DDG 111) 在该商船无视美军长达六小时的反复警告后使其动力系统瘫痪，海军陆战队通过绳降登上了这艘悬挂伊朗国旗的船只。”推文

text: OSINTdefender Following the disabling and seizure of the M/V Touska earlier today, U.S. Central Command has released footage of the U.S. Marines departing the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7) and boarding the vessel after the USS Spruance (DDG-111) disabled it with its main gun. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046081617471435214/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天早些时候 M/V Touska 号被瘫痪并扣押后，美国中央司令部发布了美国海军陆战队离开两栖攻击舰的黎波里号 (LHA 7) 并登船的视频，此前斯普鲁恩斯号 (DDG-111) 用主炮使其瘫痪。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046081617471435214/video/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines depart amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7) by helicopter and transit over the Arabian Sea to board and seize M/V Touska. The Marines rappelled onto the Iranian-flagged vessel, April 20, after guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) disabled Touska’s propulsion when the commercial ship failed to comply with repeated warnings from U.S. forces over a six-hour period. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国海军陆战队乘坐直升机离开两栖攻击舰的黎波里号 (LHA 7)，飞越阿拉伯海，登船并扣押了 M/V Touska 号。4月20日，在导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号 (DDG 111) 在该商船无视美军长达六小时的反复警告后使其动力系统瘫痪，海军陆战队通过绳降登上了这艘悬挂伊朗国旗的船只。推文

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 "Hundreds of Attacks a Day": Israel Admits Facing Relentless Iranian Cyber Assault 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “每天数百次攻击”：以色列承认面临伊朗持续不断的网络攻击 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷CENTCOM reports the USS Spruance intercepted the M/V Touska, as it transited the northern Arabian Sea in a deliberate and proportional manner. After issuing multiple warnings over a six-hour period, U.S. forces reported the vessel failed to comply.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command released a video showing Marines launching from the USS Tripoli, boarding the Iranian-flagged vessel Touska in the Arabian Sea after it was disabled by the USS Spruance for allegedly ignoring repeated warnings over a six-hour period. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国中央司令部报告称，斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（USS Spruance）在阿拉伯海北部拦截了“Touska”号商船，拦截过程审慎且适度。在六小时内发出多次警告后，美军报告称该船只未予配合……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部发布了一段视频，显示海军陆战队从的黎波里号两栖攻击舰（USS Tripoli）出发，登上了悬挂伊朗国旗的“Touska”号商船。此前，该船因被指在六小时内无视多次警告，已被斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰拦截并使其失去动力。@wfwitness

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @ChristopherJM : “…Iran has closely studied Ukraine for lessons, especially about drones, has been focused on modernising its cyberwarfare assets, and is worried about its forces’ forward planning. They show Tehran has closely watched Russian performance as well as how Ukraine has adapted to fighting a much more powerful opponent.” via @Jacob_Judah How Iran has been studying lessons from the war in Ukraine https://ft.trib.al/yxnmhL5 - Financial Times tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @ChristopherJM : “……伊朗密切研究了乌克兰的经验教训，特别是关于无人机的经验教训，一直专注于使其网络战资产现代化，并对其部队的前瞻性规划感到担忧。这些表明德黑兰密切关注俄罗斯的表现，以及乌克兰如何适应与更强大的对手作战。” 通过 @Jacob_Judah 伊朗如何从乌克兰战争中吸取教训 https://ft.trib.al/yxnmhL5 - 金融时报推文

text: WarMonitor The controversial federal surveillance contractor Palantir appears to be proposing a military draft to the U.S. government. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046076192982286554/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 备受争议的联邦监控承包商 Palantir 似乎正在向美国政府提议征兵。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046076192982286554/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. is deploying sea drones to help clear potential naval mines in the Strait of Hormuz, as part of efforts to reopen the key waterway to commercial shipping. U.S. officials say a mix of unmanned surface vessels and underwater drones equipped with sonar are being used to detect mines without putting personnel at risk, with follow-up systems able to neutralise them. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：美国正在部署海上无人机，以协助清除霍尔木兹海峡的潜在水雷，这是旨在重新开放这一关键水道用于商业航运的努力的一部分。美国官员表示，目前正在使用配备声纳的水面无人艇和水下无人机组合来探测水雷，从而无需让人员面临风险，后续系统则能够将其清除。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Zinc prices have risen to their highest since 2022. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 锌价已升至2022年以来的最高水平。推文

text: 🇺🇦 A major fire is reported in the territory of an agricultural complex in Bolshoy (Velikiy) Burluk, Kharkov region. Reports say that hangars, which were used by the Armed Forces of Ukraine to store equipment, are on fire. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 据报道，哈尔科夫地区大布尔卢克的一个农业综合体领土发生大火。据报道，乌克兰武装部队用于存放设备的机库正在燃烧。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 Tuapse was subjected to another massive drone attack last night, – the governor of Krasnodar Krai. As a result, according to preliminary information, one man died at the seaport. Another was injured and is receiving all necessary medical assistance. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 克拉斯诺达尔边疆区州长称，图阿普谢昨晚再次遭到大规模无人机袭击。据初步消息，海港有一名男子死亡。另有一人受伤，正在接受一切必要的医疗救助。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💥 Brovary, Kiev region 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 基辅地区布罗瓦里 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🐻 Start your week right, and read all the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ The Investigative Committee of Russia classifies the actions of Ukrainian armed formations in the Donetsk and Lugansk People's Republics as genocide ➡️ Satellite imagery shows that the U.S. has relocated its THAAD and Patriot launchers in Jordan to be less exposed. ➡️ A video of a 2015 conversation between George Soros and Chrystia Freeland, now serving as Zelensky's adviser on Ukraine's economic development, reveals some very interesting things about Ukraine ➡️ Trump says that his representatives are going to Pakistan to negotiate again , and here's what is known from the Iranian side ➡️ One of our admins writes an ultimate guide to Bulgarian elections ➡️ A column of Russia's "African Corps" spotted somewhere in eastern Libya. ➡️ Zelensky says reached 10-year agreements with Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar for the supply of weapons ➡️ Tasnim News reports that Iran is prepared for a possible resumption of war ➡️ The Us claims they fired on and disabled the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska in the Gulf of Oman ➡️ Iranian Armed Forces Central Headquarters announce that Iran will soon respond to US armed maritime piracy ➡️ The US Navy will apparently inspect ships heading to China as part of the fight against the supply of Iranian oil ➡️ Foreign ministers of Iran and Pakistan discuss the ceasefire ➡️ Israel responds to a published picture where their soldier smashes the head of a Jesus statue in Southern Lebanon ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf gives trading advice ➡️ Netanyahu and Javier Milei, President of Argentina, announce the launch of the "Isaac Accord." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 开启美好的一周，阅读过去24小时的所有关键新闻： ➡️ 俄罗斯调查委员会将乌克兰武装部队在顿涅茨克和卢甘斯克人民共和国的行动定性为种族灭绝 ➡️ 卫星图像显示，美国已将其在约旦的“萨德”（THAAD）和“爱国者”导弹发射架重新部署，以减少暴露。 ➡️ 一段2015年乔治·索罗斯与现任泽连斯基乌克兰经济发展顾问克里斯蒂娅·弗里兰的谈话视频，揭示了一些关于乌克兰的非常有趣的事情 ➡️ 特朗普表示，他的代表将前往巴基斯坦再次进行谈判，以下是伊朗方面已知的情况 ➡️ 我们的一位管理员撰写了一份保加利亚选举的终极指南 ➡️ 在利比亚东部某处发现了俄罗斯“非洲军团”的车队。 ➡️ 泽连斯基称已与沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和卡塔尔达成10年武器供应协议 ➡️ 塔斯尼姆通讯社报道称，伊朗已为可能重启的战争做好准备 ➡️ 美国声称他们在阿曼湾向悬挂伊朗国旗的货船“Touska”号开火并使其瘫痪 ➡️ 伊朗武装部队总参谋部宣布，伊朗很快将对美国的武装海上盗窃行为作出回应 ➡️ 美国海军显然将检查前往中国的船只，作为打击伊朗石油供应行动的一部分 ➡️ 伊朗和巴基斯坦外交部长讨论了停火事宜 ➡️ 以色列回应了一张发布的照片，照片中他们的士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸碎了一尊耶稣雕像的头部 ➡️ 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫提供贸易建议 ➡️ 内塔尼亚胡与阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱宣布启动“艾萨克协议”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: Over 20 vessels crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday, the highest ship crossing since March. 1st. Five of the ships that made it thriugh had loaded cargo from Iran with many different loads ranging from oil products and metals. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：周六有超过20艘船只穿过霍尔木兹海峡，这是自3月1日以来的最高过境量。其中五艘成功通过的船只装载了来自伊朗的货物，货物种类繁多，包括石油产品和金属。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇰🇼🇺🇸🇮🇱⚡️🇮🇷 Mishary Rashid Alafasy, a well-known Kuwaiti Qur’an reciter (Qari), is in support of U.S aggression against Iran. For context, this well-known Qari has never once condemned the U.S-Israeli aggression on Iran that has claimed civilian lives, including…" 🇸🇦 🇰🇼 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 After his controversial stance backing U.S.-Israel aggression against Iran, Mishary Rashid Al-Afasy now openly cursing Iran and anyone who stands with it, while promoting nasheed clips glorifying Gulf arsenals armed and supplied by the very powers that are butchering Muslims across the region. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇰🇼🇺🇸🇮🇱⚡️🇮🇷 著名的科威特古兰经诵读者（Qari）米沙里·拉希德·阿拉法西支持美国对伊朗的侵略。背景是，这位著名的诵读者从未谴责过美以对伊朗的侵略，这些侵略夺去了平民的生命，包括……” 🇸🇦 🇰🇼 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 在他支持美以对伊朗侵略的争议立场之后，米沙里·拉希德·阿拉法西现在公开咒骂伊朗及其支持者，同时宣传赞美海湾国家军火库的赞美诗片段，而这些军火库正是由那些在整个地区屠杀穆斯林的势力武装和供应的。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: WarMonitor A former WH nuclear official says Trump’s claim Iran’s program was “destroyed” is “just not true,” noting Iran still has enough highly enriched uranium for roughly 10–11 nuclear bombs. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046056959623766383/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位前白宫核官员表示，特朗普关于伊朗核计划已被“摧毁”的说法“根本不是事实”，并指出伊朗目前仍拥有足以制造约 10 至 11 枚核弹的高浓缩铀。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046056959623766383/photo/1 推文
